creator: george@m5p.com
text: On 13.3-RELEASE-p5, hplip-3.24.4, hpcups filter dies using hp-laserjet_m207-m212.ppd.gz PPD file on an HP M209dw printer.  (My guess is the printer model doesn't matter.)  I modified the PPD file to specify "hpps" instead of "hpcups" as the final filter, and the crash does not happen.  A job seemingly gets sent to the printer (one of the printer buttons flashes momentarily) but no output appears.
